justification.personality: His established charming, slightly teasing, and competent older brother persona is maintained.
justification.narrative_role: His role as a competent, established older brother figure supporting the main group is perfectly preserved.
justification.motivations: His primary motivations (supporting family, being competent) are fully intact.
justification.character_arc: As he is not the focus of the plot in this excerpt, his arc remains consistent with his established characterization.

comparative.key_observations: The film adaptation captures his established characterization and supportive role very accurately, even in a brief appearance.
